---
title: "Classification Validation Run"
subtitle: "End-to-end test: abstract retrieval + LLM classification"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  eval: true
---

## Setup

Source all function definitions from the main pipeline (schemas, prompts, helpers,
classification functions) without running the classification itself.

```{r}
#| label: val-setup
#| message: false

# Allow duplicate chunk labels when purling the pipeline
options(knitr.duplicate.label = "allow")

# Extract and source R code from the main pipeline
# (all chunks with eval:true run — the run-coding chunk is eval:false so it's skipped)
pipeline_qmd <- here::here(
  "field_classification",
  "article_classification_pipeline - integrated.qmd"
)
pipeline_r <- knitr::purl(pipeline_qmd, output = tempfile(fileext = ".R"), quiet = TRUE)
source(pipeline_r, local = TRUE)

# ellmer::parallel_chat uses httr2::req_perform_parallel which has a cli progress
# bar that breaks inside knitr. Override classify functions to process sequentially.
classify_articles_sequential <- function(
  articles_df,
  title_col = "title",
  abstract_col = "abstract",
  journal_col = "journal",
  model = "openai/gpt-oss-120b",
  provider = "deepinfra"
) {
  articles_list <- articles_df |>
    rowwise() |>
    reframe(
      article = toJSON(
        list(
          article_title = .data[[title_col]] %||% "",
          article_abstract = .data[[abstract_col]] %||% "",
          journal_title = .data[[journal_col]] %||% ""
        ),
        auto_unbox = TRUE
      )
    ) |>
    pull(article) |>
    as.character() |>
    clean_json_text()

  n <- length(articles_list)
  cluster_ids <- character(n)
  confidences <- numeric(n)
  secondary_ids <- character(n)
  secondary_confs <- numeric(n)
  reasonings <- character(n)

  cat(sprintf("Classifying %d articles into clusters (sequential)...\n", n))

  for (i in seq_len(n)) {
    if (i %% 10 == 0 || i == n) cat(sprintf("  %d / %d\n", i, n))

    chat <- create_cluster_chat(model = model, provider = provider,
                                api_args = list(temperature = 0))
    tryCatch({
      chat$chat(articles_list[i])
      turns <- chat$get_turns()
      assistant_turn <- turns[[2]]

      content <- assistant_turn@text
      parsed <- tryCatch(fromJSON(content),
        error = function(e) list(cluster_id = NA_character_, confidence = NA_real_,
                                 secondary_cluster_id = NA_character_,
                                 secondary_confidence = NA_real_))

      reasoning <- tryCatch(
        assistant_turn@json$choices[[1]]$message$reasoning_content %||% NA_character_,
        error = function(e) NA_character_)

      cluster_ids[i] <- parsed$cluster_id %||% NA_character_
      confidences[i] <- parsed$confidence %||% NA_real_
      secondary_ids[i] <- parsed$secondary_cluster_id %||% NA_character_
      secondary_confs[i] <- parsed$secondary_confidence %||% NA_real_
      reasonings[i] <- reasoning
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("  Error on article ", i, ": ", e$message)
      cluster_ids[i] <<- NA_character_
      confidences[i] <<- NA_real_
      secondary_ids[i] <<- NA_character_
      secondary_confs[i] <<- NA_real_
      reasonings[i] <<- NA_character_
    })
  }

  articles_df |>
    bind_cols(tibble(
      cluster_id = cluster_ids,
      confidence = confidences,
      secondary_cluster_id = secondary_ids,
      secondary_confidence = secondary_confs,
      reasoning = reasonings
    ))
}

classify_fields_sequential <- function(
  cluster_results,
  cluster_breakdowns,
  title_col = "title",
  abstract_col = "abstract",
  journal_col = "journal",
  model = "openai/gpt-oss-120b",
  provider = "deepinfra",
  field_threshold = 100
) {
  cluster_counts <- cluster_results |> count(cluster_id) |> arrange(desc(n))

  cat("\n=== CLUSTERS REQUIRING FIELD CLASSIFICATION ===\n")
  clusters_above_threshold <- cluster_counts |> filter(n >= field_threshold)

  if (nrow(clusters_above_threshold) > 0) {
    print(clusters_above_threshold)
  } else {
    cat("No clusters with >= ", field_threshold, " articles\n")
    return(cluster_results)
  }

  results_with_fields <- tibble()

  for (cid in clusters_above_threshold$cluster_id) {
    if (!(cid %in% names(cluster_breakdowns))) {
      cat(sprintf("Note: No field schema available for cluster '%s'\n", cid))
      next
    }

    config <- cluster_breakdowns[[cid]]
    articles_idx <- which(cluster_results$cluster_id == cid)
    n_articles <- length(articles_idx)
    cat(sprintf("\nClassifying %d %s articles into fields (sequential)...\n",
                n_articles, cid))

    field_ids <- character(n_articles)
    field_confs <- numeric(n_articles)
    field_reasonings <- character(n_articles)

    for (j in seq_len(n_articles)) {
      idx <- articles_idx[j]
      if (j %% 10 == 0 || j == n_articles) cat(sprintf("  %d / %d\n", j, n_articles))

      article_json <- toJSON(list(
        article_title = cluster_results[[title_col]][idx] %||% "",
        article_abstract = cluster_results[[abstract_col]][idx] %||% "",
        journal_title = cluster_results[[journal_col]][idx] %||% ""
      ), auto_unbox = TRUE) |> as.character() |> clean_json_text()

      field_chat <- config$chat_constructor(model = model, provider = provider,
                                            api_args = list(temperature = 0))
      tryCatch({
        field_chat$chat(article_json)
        turns <- field_chat$get_turns()
        assistant_turn <- turns[[2]]

        parsed <- tryCatch(fromJSON(assistant_turn@text),
          error = function(e) list(field_id = NA_character_, confidence = NA_real_))

        reasoning <- tryCatch(
          assistant_turn@json$choices[[1]]$message$reasoning_content %||% NA_character_,
          error = function(e) NA_character_)

        field_ids[j] <- parsed$field_id %||% NA_character_
        field_confs[j] <- parsed$confidence %||% NA_real_
        field_reasonings[j] <- reasoning
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("  Error on field article ", j, ": ", e$message)
        field_ids[j] <<- NA_character_
        field_confs[j] <<- NA_real_
        field_reasonings[j] <<- NA_character_
      })
    }

    current_cluster <- cid
    current_results <- cluster_results |>
      filter(cluster_id == current_cluster) |>
      bind_cols(tibble(
        field_id = field_ids,
        field_confidence = field_confs,
        field_reasoning = field_reasonings
      ))
    cluster_results <- cluster_results |> filter(cluster_id != current_cluster)
    results_with_fields <- bind_rows(results_with_fields, current_results)
  }

  bind_rows(results_with_fields, cluster_results)
}
```

## Sample DOIs

Draw 250 unique `doi_o` values from the main COS dataset.

```{r}
#| label: sample-dois

cos_data <- read_csv(here::here("2025-02-07_COSdata_validated_delivered.csv"),
                     show_col_types = FALSE)

set.seed(42)
dois_all <- unique(na.omit(cos_data$doi_o))
n_sample <- min(250, length(dois_all))
dois_sample <- sample(dois_all, n_sample)

cat(sprintf("Sampled %d unique doi_o (out of %d available)\n", n_sample, length(dois_all)))
```

## Retrieve Abstracts

```{r}
#| label: fetch-abstracts

articles <- fetch_abstracts(dois_sample)

cat(sprintf("\nAbstracts retrieved: %d / %d\n", nrow(articles), n_sample))
cat(sprintf("Missing: %d\n", n_sample - nrow(articles)))
cat("\n=== Abstract Source Breakdown ===\n")
print(count(articles, abstract_source))
```

## Classify into Subject Areas

```{r}
#| label: classify-clusters

results <- classify_articles_sequential(
 articles_df = articles,
 title_col = "title",
 abstract_col = "abstract",
 journal_col = "source_display_name"
)
```

## Classify into Subject Fields (areas with >100 articles)

```{r}
#| label: classify-fields

results <- classify_fields_sequential(
  results,
  cluster_breakdowns = cluster_breakdowns,
  journal_col = "source_display_name"
)
```

## Save Results

```{r}
#| label: save

# Save the validation input data (doi, title, abstract, journal, source)
write_csv(
  articles |> select(doi, title, abstract, source_display_name, abstract_source),
  here::here("field_classification", "validation_articles.csv")
)

# Save classification results
write_csv(results, here::here("field_classification", "validation_classified.csv"))
cat("Saved validation_articles.csv and validation_classified.csv\n")
```

## Summary

```{r}
#| label: summary

cat("=== Subject Area Distribution ===\n")
results |>
  count(cluster_id, sort = TRUE) |>
  print(n = Inf)

cat("\n=== Confidence Distribution ===\n")
summary(results$confidence)

cat("\n=== Low Confidence Articles (< 0.8) ===\n")
low_conf <- results |> filter(confidence < 0.8)
cat(sprintf("%d articles with confidence < 0.8\n", nrow(low_conf)))
if (nrow(low_conf) > 0) {
  low_conf |>
    select(doi, title, cluster_id, confidence) |>
    print(n = 20)
}

cat("\n=== Secondary Subject Area Assignments ===\n")
multi <- results |> filter(!is.na(secondary_cluster_id))
cat(sprintf("%d articles assigned a secondary Subject Area\n", nrow(multi)))
if (nrow(multi) > 0) {
  multi |>
    select(doi, title, cluster_id, secondary_cluster_id, secondary_confidence) |>
    print(n = 20)
}

if ("field_id" %in% names(results)) {
  cat("\n=== Subject Field Distribution (where assigned) ===\n")
  results |>
    filter(!is.na(field_id)) |>
    count(cluster_id, field_id, sort = TRUE) |>
    print(n = Inf)
}
```
